Page 1
Supps Ultimate Script
Here is a recording of a gym owner using this exact script to sell two ultimate packs to one
client in 10 minutes:
https://bodyforge.wistia.com/medias/ptma766qaf
Step 1: Break the Ice and Gather Information
Key Point:
During the nutrition orientation make sure to build hype around supps.
Okay! So, it’s funny everyone always wants to ask questions about what supplements
to buy etc. (Please ignore those on your meal plans for now). And I promise I will get to
that, but first I want to focus on what is important for your long-term success.
Nutrition. Is that okay?
Go through the nutrition presentation and deliver value.
Sounds good? Have any questions?
Okay great, now let’s turn your meal plan to the front and I’ll explain which products
you’re gonna need.
So, I’ve been taking supplements for the last 8 years and it’s always given me the
upper edge. But the problem is I’ve had to formulate and mix and match multiple
other brands to get what I wanted, in the right amounts. It worked. But it was a major
pain, not to mention, very expensive.
Obviously, I can’t do that with clients. And getting clients to mix different pills and
powders is usually not the smartest Idea. So that’s why I’ve been working my butt off
to get in with Prestige Labs and Dr. Kashey.
And you’ve seen those celebrity transformation pictures, right? You know. You go to
the grocery store and you see like the Olympians and their transformations.
And it’s because a lot of it goes hand in hand with the types of products they’re
taking.
So, we as _GYM NAME_ are officially one of only a handful gyms that are licensed to
carry their line of products in YOUR STATE.
Which is really freaking cool.
So that’s been awesome. Because we A. really want to make sure we have something
that works, and B. is going to be super high quality. So, you’re not just peeing your
money away by taking supplements that don’t actually work.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 8 --

Page 2
For example, Fat burners. Fat burners are a great concept, but most companies just
put a bunch of fillers and caffeine in it. So it’s crap that doesn’t work.
That’s why I’ve waited a long time to get licensed by Prestige. So we can actually get
stuff that works.
Which has taken a lot or research and energy. A freaking lot.
(Laugh here)
So, let me walk you through what you’ll start with!
Obviously, you’re not going to do the female transformation right?
(Say “male” if talking to a female AND Laugh! It’s corny but breaks the ice.)
You don’t want any estrogen.
(Say “chest hair” if talking to female.)
Now because everybody is different _Name_, I’m going to read you a few statements.
At the end YOU just tell me YES if the statement applies to YOU. Cool? PERFECT! Here
we go…
From time to time you get sudden food cravings or indulge in stress eating.
(BURN AM/PM- Cravings)
You’ve had trouble meal prepping or eating healthy for every single meal of the day.
(Protein blend/Bulletproof Vitality - Eating Healthy)
Some days you struggle getting motivated to workout.
(Pre step 1 and 2 -Motivation and/or Sleep Multiplier - Motivation/Energy)
You get really sore or burnt out after working out which can discourage you from
going back.
(Intra/Test Storm - Soreness and Fatigue)
Excess stress or lack of quality sleep are keeping you from feeling your best.
(Sleep Multiplier - Stress & Sleep, Burn PM - Stress)
You have been dealing with bloating, retaining water weight, or are worried about
your internal digestive health.
(Last Minute Cleanse)
You have an event coming up soon that you want to look your best for.
(Last Minute Cleanse)
You are struggling with plateaus. You gain weight easily when eating carbs. And
regain weight easily after a dieting period.
(EFA Hormone Optimizer, Burn AM/PM)
You want to increase muscle tone and lose fat but often struggle staying focused and
seeing things through.
(Test Storm)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 8 --

Page 3
Okay _Name_, because you’re struggling with _Issues from Responses (cravings,
eating healthy, getting motivated, soreness and fatigue, stress & sleep, bloating/water
weight/event, plateaus/mood/appetite, fat/appetite/energy)_, I’m setting you up with
the perfect supplement combination to help you deal with all those things that have
prevented you from hitting your goals in the past. This will make reaching your goals
a lot faster and easier
If they ask you how much it’s going to cost:
Not sure yet. We'll find out in a minute. But what I can tell you is the company we use
has options for everyone, right now I need you to focus on how a personally tailored
supplementation protocol is a pivotal part of removing _Issues from Responses _
problem. You'll love them. Cool?
Step 2: Match Products to Pain
Alright, now give me a minute so I can make sure your game plan is perfect to handle
your struggles with _One or more to fit their responses from Step #1_.
Use a conversational, professional, and informed tone.
CHECK OFF PRODUCTS AS YOU GO!
Only mention products that you specifically know they’re interested in.
Tell them you will be sending them videos on how to take everything, so they don’t have to
memorize this now and reduces the time spent on the sale. You can text everyone
instructions after they buy.
Be funny! For test storm, I always let them know that their sexual drive may shoot through
the roof.
Ok great...
#1 BURN AM and PM
Food cravings… stress eating… We can fix that…
I’m going to set you up with BURN AM and PM… gotta have this…
Burn AM is a fat burning product. I think it is the best on the market and it is
stimulant free. It works to increase the energy you use by increasing your metabolic
rate, releasing more fat, and burning more of it. Burn PM works with it too and was
made to help you reduce and manage stress, decrease cravings, and feel fuller for
longer.
I want you to take these every day, OK?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 8 --

Page 4
#2 Vanilla Protein Blend
Trouble meal prepping… eating healthy… We can fix that…
I’m going to set you up with the Homemade Vanilla Nutrition Shake this is amazing,
you gotta have it.
I want you to be excited about your food and make getting your protein in easy. This is
delicious - I put it in my coffee, use it for shakes, and make actual ice cream with it.
Plus, it has ingredients to benefit your immune system and overall health.
I want you to have it in the morning and a shake post-workout. OK?
#3 Pre Step 1 and 2
Struggling with getting motivated… We can fix that…
I’m going to send you PRE Step 1 and 2… gotta have this…
Pre was created to be the best pre-workout product and contains ingredients for
increased power and focused energy without making you feel jittery. This will help
you dominate your workout.
Do you like Blue Raspberry or Fruit Punch better?
#4 Intra
Getting really sore or burnt out after working out… We can fix that…
I’m going to send you Intra. This is amazing. Intra has the amino acid building blocks
your body needs to fire on all cylinders. It will help you recover faster and be less sore.
It will hyper hydrate your muscles so you can get more bang for your buck in every
workout and it tastes amazing.
I want you to take your Intra during every workout with 8-12 ounces of water. Do you
like Blue Raspberry or Fruit Punch better?
#5 Sleep Multiplier
Excess stress, lack of quality sleep, brain fog, and fatigue… we can fix that…
I’m going to set you up Sleep Multiplier. Gotta have this… It’s our sleep fix.
I want you to fall asleep faster and get high-quality sleep. It also helps support your
metabolism while you sleep. You will wake up feeling like a million bucks, every
morning.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 8 --

Page 5
I want you to take sleep multiplier capsules 90 minutes before bed every night, OK?
#6 Test Storm
Storing fat in unwanted areas, not getting good results from working out… We can fix
that… I’m going to send you Test Storm. Gotta have this….
This for testosterone multiplication and getting more out of your natural testosterone.
I want you to take these when you every night to increase testosterone before bed. It
may also have some other off label side effects that no one has complained about so
far (laugh). Sound good?
#7 Bulletproof Vitality
Lacking nutrients, don’t know which vitamins to take… We can fix that…
I’m going to set you up with Bulletproof Vitality. Gotta have this….
This is designed to fill nutritional gaps to support lean muscle, promote better health
through quality of life. There is a version specifically designed for _Men/Women_.
I want you to take 2 of the Bulletproof Vitality every morning, OK?
#8 Last Minute Cleanse
Pick One:
Feeling bloated…
OR
Needing to detox…
OR
Event coming up…
We can fix that… I’m going to set you up with Last Minute Cleanse. Gotta have this….
This contains ingredients that can help you cleanse and fight that bloated,
balloon-in-your-stomach feeling.
I want you to take 1 capsule for the first 4 days with 8 ounces of water when you wake
up. After the first 4 days, increase that to two capsules. OK?
#8 EFA Hormone Optimizer
Fighting plateaus, improves carbohydrate tolerance, and helps keep your mood and
appetite stable… We can fix that…
I’m going to send you the EFA Hormone Optimizer.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 8 --

Page 6
I call this the “Plateau Buster”. It is designed for regulating blood sugar, insulin and
regulating inflammation. It helps keep your hormones optimized to keep you seeing
consistent progress.
I want you to take 4 of these either in the morning or at night. It is important that you
try to take them at the same time every day, OK?
Step 3: Agree Purchase Supplements
GREAT! So what I’m going to do _Name_ is I’m going to set you up with the
MENS/WOMENS Ultimate Stack. It’s what I take, all my coaches take and it includes
every supplement I just went over. These never go on sale, and right now since you’re
now a coaching client, I’m going to give you my licensed distributor discount so I can
save you a bunch of money and you can get them for what I get them for. Sound
good?
Which Flavor would you prefer? Fruit Punch or Blue Raspberry?
This line is VERY important!
Okay, great!
Now, my biggest recommendation for everyone is that we’re going to do this for 60-
90 days straight to get the cumulative effect of everything. Because that’s about how
long it’ll take.
But for you based off your goals let’s start with 60 days and then we will reassess and
see if we need to tailor down on anything.
So, this stuff will come in about three business days. You’re going to see that in the
nutrition portal I have videos reminding you how to take it all.
You can use the example 42 Day Detox/6 Week Challenge membership funnel we provide in
the Fulfillment course. Add in your own videos so it feels custom.
This stuff is going to change the game. There’s no reason that in 60 days after doing
this you’re not _2 Month Goal_ closer to your _Main Goal_ goal.
Know their freaking goal!
You excited? Cool let’s do it.
Here’s the other cool part. We’re going to save you a crap ton of money because you’ll
get your 60 day supply with us.
Because, here’s my goal. If we can get you and everyone better results you guys will
stay longer right?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 8 --

Page 7
So you know how it works, Prestige gives us their retail price what they want us to sell
it for. They want us to sell the ultimate for the $700
Point to price sheet.
So, it’s like $1400 for the two months you’re going to get.
But here’s the deal. Now that we are a licensed distributor, I can give it to you for what
I get it for…$402.
And if you wanna save a little money and get it all up front you can get a whole 3-
month package for $1206 and just pay shipping once. You’re gonna use it anyways,
may as well save a little.
My goal is that you get faster results and stay longer.
So, by ordering through me as a licensed distributor you’re saving $900.
So, do you want Fruit Punch or Blue Raspberry (I take blue raspberry)
CLOSE WITH THIS!!
If Price is an Issue
Initiate “CROSSOUTS” method. Cross out some supplements to reduce the cost and sell
others.
At next training:
Ok - got it. If you are on a budget, then let’s just cross out the things that are nice to
haves and just leave you with the things you are really gonna need.
Cool?
Pick 4 supplements you want to sell. In this example:
PERFORMANCE STACK: Sleep, BURN AM, BURN PM, INTRA
CROSSOUTS:
Man, Bulletproof Vitality is an amazing product, but you can probably get away with…
Flintstones vitamins or a generic vitamin you can get at the store.
EFA is fantastic but for now, you can get by with Fish oil from the store. Sam’s Club,
Kirkland, etc.
Last Minute Cleanse is great but we can see if you need to lose the last few pounds
when we’re near the end of the program, so we can hold off on this one.
For PRE, you can get away with something with caffeine like a cup of coffee for now.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 8 --

Page 8
Test Storm is awesome, but you probably don’t wanna gain any chest hair, so we can
cross this one out too.
Ok, so these are the bare essentials that you’re gonna wanna make sure you have –
INTRA, BURN AM/PM, and Sleep Multiplier.
And the nice thing is, I can give you a discount code that gives you buy 3 get one free
so it would take your total down from $402 to $238.
If you wanna save an extra $74 you can just go on subscribe & save since you’re going
to be taking these for over a month anyways.
So that takes you to $201. You wanna just use the card you have on file?
HAVE THE CARD ON FILE RIGHT THERE TO GET THEM TO SIGN THE PAPER WITH THE CC
OR HAVE THEM SIGN IT AND ADD IT LATER.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
